results.title: Avengers: Doomsday: Did The First Trailer Inadvertently Spoil The Movie's Ending?
results.description: The first trailer for Avengers: Doomsday features plenty of big talking points, but has Marvel Studios revealed a key scene from the end of the movie? If so, it has major ramifications for two heroes.

results.title: Kelly Osbourne 'aches every single day' she says in Ozzy tribute
results.description: One year after the death of Ozzy Osbourne, daughter Kelly Osbourne posted a remembrance of her father on Instagram detailing her grief and memories.
